stimulus:
Welcome! In this study, you will play three short video games, completing a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"Interesting concept of playing as a Moth trying to reach the moon while maintaining stamina, although the speed of the moth is too fast in my opinion","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"Never played or seen a game before where you play as a moth, the surprise were the smooth controls","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"The controls were enjoyable and the scenery, the speed which moth flies up was too fast though.","authenticity-rating":4,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"It looks like the developer put his heart and time in it to make something that no one ever tried to make before"}

stimulus:
You have completed your evaluation of the first video game.

Press any key to proceed to the second game.

response: {"creativity-rating":5,"creativity-free-response":"Having the ability to rename objects to make them change into whatever you want, for example:from a wall to a wall that you can pass through.","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"The ability to make your own path and having to think which object to change into what","effectiveness-rating":3,"effectiveness-free-response":"The concept of giving the player freedom of choice was good, the graphics and quality were very old looking.","attention-check":3,"authenticity-rating":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"I think it's just a fun side project and not meant to be a full on game, but its a cool concept."}

response: {"creativity-rating":3,"creativity-free-response":"I actually dont know what to answer to this question as the game was buggy and I dont even know what happened","originality-rating":4,"originality-free-response":"It seemed like an original idea with the cube dragging along the wall","effectiveness-rating":1,"effectiveness-free-response":"It felt very weird and sluggish, the cube was very slow and I don't even know how I got past the level","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"Game had black color and it looked very, empty and soulless"}
